name: FhirConditionCategoryToOmop
title: FHIR Condition.category → OMOP condition_type_concept_id
description: FHIR Condition.category (problem-list-item / encounter-diagnosis / health-concern from condition-category CodeSystem) maps to OMOP Type Concept vocabulary. Two clean matches: encounter-diagnosis → 32827 (EHR encounter record), problem-list-item → 32840 (EHR problem list). health-concern falls back to 32817 (generic EHR) since OMOP has no closer concept.
